text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are three racers getting a lot of attention in
this year's Classic Triple Crown tour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide, Narita Taishin, and Winning
Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As they've been rivals since before their debuts,
people have given them a special nickname.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
So it's finally time for BNW's first Triple Crown
showdown! I wonder who's gonna win!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
It's gotta be Taishin. Her final sprint last time was
amazing.

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Didn't you see Biwa Hayahide in the junior races?
The way she accelerates from the get-go is
something else!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
But you gotta admit Winning Ticket is great too.
Her power in the final stretch is the best.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While the expectations for their match are
running high, the racers themselves are quietly
making their way through the tunnel entrance.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: ALL RIGHT! I'm gonna go all out!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'll be the one to break ahead and win!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I've calculated my formula to win. All that's left is
to get the final result.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
(I gotta win this and prove myself ahead of the
Derby!)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
(But then again, that goes for Taishin and
Hayahide too!)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wooo! I'll see you two later!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket dashes off toward the track,
where the crowd is abuzz with high expectations.
